description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This document defines the steps to withdraw a yield-earning balance from the Aave AToken vaults to the ALM Proxy.

The process for withdrawing Aave ATokens on destination blockchain through the `ForeignController` contract is the same as the one for withdrawing Aave ATokens on Ethereum Mainnet through the `MainnetController` contract, see [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.2.1.2.3.2 - General Withdraw from Aave ATokens Procedure](6e75a2bd-70b7-4081-bb9f-39cf6b321066).
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
